name: 2025 - 26 Tulia Amboseli Safari Camp - RACK Non-Resident Rates

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Mountainview Superb Tents - 9 Double /Twin Tents, and 1 Family tent (Max. of 6) Mountainview Deluxe Tents w/Private Plunge Pools - 10 Double /Twin Tents
texts.text: Mountainview Superb Tents - 9 Double /Twin Tents, and 1 Family tent (Max. of 6) Mountainview Deluxe Tents w/Private Plunge Pools - 10 Double /Twin Tents

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All rates are quoted in USD, and the adult sharing rates are a per person sharing (PPS) rate.
texts.text: All rates are quoted in USD, and the adult sharing rates are a per person sharing (PPS) rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Rates are inclusive of all statutory taxes.
texts.text: Rates are inclusive of all statutory taxes.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All quoted rates are RACK and are commissionable except for EXTRA services, which are quoted on NETT basis.
texts.text: All quoted rates are RACK and are commissionable except for EXTRA services, which are quoted on NETT basis.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Full Board rates include breakfast, lunch, dinner, and in-room water.
texts.text: Full Board rates include breakfast, lunch, dinner, and in-room water.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Game Package rates include breakfast, lunch, dinner, shared 4 x 4 open-sided Safari Trucks, walking safari, airstrip transfers, Amboseli Park Kimana gate transfers, and soft drinks and water while on safari.
texts.text: Game Package rates include breakfast, lunch, dinner, shared 4 x 4 open-sided Safari Trucks, walking safari, airstrip transfers, Amboseli Park Kimana gate transfers, and soft drinks and water while on safari.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Child sharing rate is applicable for children aged 5 - 11.9 years sharing with one or two adults.
texts.text: Child sharing rate is applicable for children aged 5 - 11.9 years sharing with one or two adults.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children under 5 years stay free (excluding park fees).
texts.text: Children under 5 years stay free (excluding park fees).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children staying in own room pay 75% of the room rate.
texts.text: Children staying in own room pay 75% of the room rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Park/Conservation fees are not included on the room rates quoted.
texts.text: Park/Conservation fees are not included on the room rates quoted.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Park/Conservation fees are subject to change by the authorities, without prior notice.
texts.text: Park/Conservation fees are subject to change by the authorities, without prior notice.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Park/Conservation fees quoted are valid for 24 hours
texts.text: Park/Conservation fees quoted are valid for 24 hours
